core_reformulation: endpoint displacement |W(i+n)-W(i)|_inf is the WRONG ballistic quantity (recurrence kills it); the SEGMENT DIAMETER S(n)=min_i cheb-diam(W[i..i+n]) is the right one, and S(n)>=c*n <=> sojourn L(rho)<=(2/c)rho.

endpoint_ballistic_FAILS.reason: route3 W-window: Cheb<=20 pairs at path-gap 885, nonadjacent Cheb-1 pairs => ratio -> 0

key_lemma: level-uniform diameter-ballistic constant c>=0.64 (equiv. linear sojourn L(rho)<=3.1*rho); recursion reduces it to anti-stacking: per-level multiplier lambda*||Minv||_eff <= 1, which needs the arc-anisotropy (curve-like + triple-free spread the extra lambda/detM^(1/3)=1.117 factor of points TRANSVERSELY, not stacked along the arc). Isotropic bound (4/9) gives 1.78 and cannot certify it.
